label: Online Connectivity Unit (OCU) w/ integrated eSIM (VW Group)
notes: Model-level evidence: Golf/ID.3/ID. Buzz describe OCU with integrated eSIM responsible for LTE connectivity tasks.
source_name: Volkswagen Newsroom — The new ID.3: Controls, connectivity and assist systems
evidence_note: VW tech page states OCU has embedded eSIM and performs LTE Advanced connectivity tasks.

label: Embedded eSIM (OCU-integrated) — VW Group
notes: Embedded SIM integrated into OCU (fixed eSIM) enabling connected services.
source_name: Volkswagen Newsroom — World premiere for the new Golf: digitalised, connected, and intelligent
evidence_note: VW describes OCU featuring an integrated eSIM enabling connected services.

label: LG Electronics
notes: Supplier/regulatory filings describe LG 'Online Connectivity Unit' telematics device developed for Volkswagen vehicles.
source_name: FCC Report — LG Electronics Online Connectivity Unit (FCC ID: BEJTLVHE4IU-N)
evidence_note: FCC filing text ties LG OCU telematics device to Volkswagen vehicles; cellular comms responsibilities described.

label: Embedded SIM (ConnectedDrive) — BMW Group
notes: BMW PressClub overview describes a permanently installed SIM enabling connected services (capability-level).
evidence_note: BMW states vehicles are equipped with a permanently installed SIM enabling connected services.

label: 3G/4G SIM card (mandatory in new cars) — Renault Group
notes: Renault Group article describes a mandatory 3G/4G SIM card enabling connected services/remote features.
source_name: Renault Group Magazine — The connected car is already a reality
evidence_note: Renault Group states a 3G/4G SIM card is mandatory in new cars and enables connected services.

label: Telematics / TCU (Capability)
evidence_note: VW states Online Connectivity Unit (OCU) has embedded eSIM and performs connectivity (LTE).

label: Telematics / TCU (Capability)
source_name: BMW NA Service Action — Program telematics control unit (ATM2)
evidence_note: Bulletin states SIM card installed in telematics control unit (ATM2) and discusses network connection issues.

label: Telematics / TCU (Capability)
evidence_note: Interior fuse box label explicitly lists 'Telematics module (TCAM)'.

label: Telematics / TCU (Capability)
source_name: Mercedes-Benz AG Campaign No. 2023110006 — SIM Card Communication Module – Wave 1
evidence_note: Campaign bulletin references HERMES control unit (N112/9) 'telematics services' communication module; SIM card data (ICCID/IMSI), OTA updates, replacement if necessary.

label: Telematics / TCU (Capability)
source_name: FCA US LLC / Stellantis — TSB 08-174-21 Flash: Telematics Box Module (TBM) Updates (NHTSA-hosted)
evidence_note: TSB explicitly references Telematics Box Module (TBM), incl. Wi-Fi and SOS availability; applies to vehicles equipped with Global TBM (Sales Code RDG).

label: Telematics / TCU (Capability)
source_name: Volvo Cars Support — Connectivity issues: Restarting the car's connectivity module (TCAM)
evidence_note: Volvo support article instructs restarting the car's connectivity module (TCAM); indicates embedded telematics connectivity module.

label: Telematics / TCU (Capability)
source_name: Hyundai Owner's Manual — Fuse/relay panel description (lists E-CALL UNIT)
evidence_note: Fuse/relay panel description lists 'E-CALL UNIT' among protected circuits, indicating embedded emergency call connectivity module.

label: Telematics / TCU (Capability)
source_name: Toyota Australia — Connected Services Privacy Policy
evidence_note: Toyota defines DCM as modem with built-in SIM fitted to the vehicle for connected services.

label: Telematics / TCU (Capability)
source_name: Ford SSM 50651 (via NHTSA) — TCU Embedded Modem
evidence_note: Ford service message references 'TCU Embedded Modem' for SYNC Connect/FordPass access.

label: Telematics / TCU (Capability)
source_name: GM Service Bulletin (via NHTSA) — VCIM referenced
evidence_note: GM bulletin explicitly names Vehicle Communication Interface Module (VCIM) / telematics communication interface control module for OnStar.

label: Telematics / TCU (Capability)
source_name: LDV Automotive Australia — Connected App page
evidence_note: LDV (SAIC brand) states connected vehicles are equipped with Telematic Box (TBOX) that provides network access and uploads data.

evidence_note: Official Farizon manual fuse table references T-BOX circuits, confirming in-vehicle telematics box.

evidence_note: NIO OEM manual describes 112-based eCall in-vehicle system (embedded connectivity) and references ECALL in fuse/circuit list.
